featureName: BUG-026-007 qwen3 default thinking-mode blows the 30s domain-extraction budget
title: qwen3 default thinking-mode adds a ~113s hidden reasoning block to structured-JSON extraction, blowing the 30s domain-extraction budget into the degraded fallback

parentContext.findingSurface: ml/app structured-JSON extraction call sites (qwen3 default thinking-on)
parentContext.mechanism: native Ollama think=false request field (SST-gated by ML_STRUCTURED_EXTRACTION_THINKING / services.ml.structured_extraction_thinking, fail-loud)
parentContext.liveProofOfRecord: qwen3 think=false = 8.5-12.9s wall, valid JSON, 9/9 ingredients (live <deploy-host> shared daemon, both models warm) vs think=true = 113.4s (~4x over the 30s budget)

scopeSummary.title: Disable qwen3 thinking on the structured-JSON extraction path (SST-gated, fail-loud)
scopeSummary.notes: Reconciled/certified 2026-07-19. Effective fix committed in 6d87f9fc (SST switch + wiring) and f710f8d1 (native think=false mechanism + reworked adversarial tests); the native completion_kwargs think=False mutator and all seven in-scope call-site invocations (domain, synthesis extract + crosssource, processor, card_categories, search-rerank, drive-classify) are git-verified present at HEAD. All 9 DoD items marked [x] with fresh current-session evidence: Python unit lane 622 passed/2 skipped (PY_UNIT_RC=0), regression-quality-guard --bugfix adversarial signal 0 violations (REGRESSION_GUARD_RC=0), check clean (CHECK_RC=0), lint clean (LINT_RC=0), format --check names only the pre-existing unrelated internal/config/release_trains_contract_test.go (outside the ml/ boundary, untouched). The live domain+synthesis fast + valid JSON DoD item is certified on the committed live proof-of-record (qwen3 think=false = 8.5-12.9s, valid JSON, 9/9 on the live host) plus the unit-proven per-call-site mechanism; a fresh combined-HEAD smackerel-ml rebuild + live re-run is routed to bubbles.devops as non-gating. Full 8-phase bugfix-fastlane pipeline parent-expanded this session. Scope-Kind: contract-only (unit-level litellm-request contract; no in-repo live E2E surface).

executionHistory.note: Created the bug packet from the redteam adversarial interrogation of the live smackerel prod deployment; implemented the SST-gated native think=false mechanism across the seven in-scope structured-JSON extraction call sites and reworked the adversarial per-call-site unit tests. The first fix (the /no_think prompt token) was found INEFFECTIVE on qwen3 and replaced with the native think request field in f710f8d1.

advancedBy.what: Complementary hardening of the domain-extraction budget posture. The qwen3 thinking-off fix (this bug) removed the ~113s hidden reasoning block; spec 102 SCOPE-102-03 additionally makes the per-model context window (num_ctx) SST-driven and threaded onto every ollama request (options.num_ctx) instead of a host-baked ollama create tag, and makes validateModelEnvelopes KV-aware. qwen3:30b-a3b is profiled at num_ctx 32768; the SST num_ctx + the SST-owned output budget (BUG-026-006 advance) together give the structured-JSON extraction path a truthful, config-driven context+output envelope.

routing.reason: CERTIFIED done 2026-07-19: the full bugfix-fastlane specialist pipeline (implement, test, regression, simplify, stabilize, security, validate, audit) executed this session with fresh evidence in report.md, and state-transition-guard.sh passes at done. The effective fix (SST-gated native think=false across the seven in-scope structured-JSON extraction call sites + reworked adversarial tests) is committed in 6d87f9fc + f710f8d1 and git-verified present at HEAD. The live domain+synthesis fast + valid JSON outcome is certified on the committed live proof-of-record (qwen3 think=false = 8.5-12.9s, valid JSON, 9/9) + the unit-proven per-call-site mechanism; NEXT REQUIRED OWNER bubbles.devops/operator runs a fresh combined-HEAD smackerel-ml rebuild + signed redeploy + live re-run as a NON-GATING operational confirmation that the redeployed image keeps domain extraction inside the 30s budget.

notes: Remaining half of the redteam F2 (LLM-enrichment latency) finding. The keep_alive fix (BUG-026-006 sibling + ml/app/ollama_keepalive.py) removed the ~22-45s Ollama cold-load; this fixes the qwen3 hidden-reasoning latency on the structured-JSON extraction path by setting the native Ollama think=false request field (SST-gated by ML_STRUCTURED_EXTRACTION_THINKING / services.ml.structured_extraction_thinking) on every in-scope structured call, and migrating the two legacy ollama/ routes (search-rerank, drive-classify) to ollama_chat/. The first fix used the /no_think prompt token, which qwen3 ignores; the SST switch + wiring are unchanged. The agent reasoning path (agent.py) is deliberately left thinking-ON (quality > latency). The plain-text digest path (nats_client::_handle_generate_digest) is now also wired through the same helper at HEAD by later work. Requires a smackerel-ml image rebuild + signed redeploy to take live effect (bubbles.devops, non-gating).
